data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimized choices on the interface to streamline decision-making for users.
data.technical_spec: Simplified menu structures within chat and settings interfaces.

data.title: Fitts’ Law
data.description: Optimizing experience by positioning frequently used elements within easy reach.
data.technical_spec: Larger tappable areas on commonly used buttons like ‘Send’ and ‘Voice Note’.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Keeping information chunks manageable for better user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Segmented user interface for settings and conversation options.

data.title: Jacob’s Law
data.description: Leveraging user familiarity with common design patterns for ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of intuitive icons and interaction models across the app.

data.title: The Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic design that enhances overall usability perception.
data.technical_spec: Simple yet modern interface design that focuses on user content.
